name: Peaches and Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 can (20 oz) Sliced Peaches, drained (reserve syrup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, eggs, milk, baking powder, and vanilla pudding mix. Mix until well combined.
2. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan.
3. Arrange the sliced peaches over the top of the batter.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, peach syrup, and cinnamon. Mix until smooth.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the peaches.
6. Sprinkle the remaining sugar over the top of the cheesecake.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set.
8. Allow the cheesecake to cool in the pan before transferring it to the refrigerator to store.
